# OpenList Schema Quick Reference

This file is derived from `https://fox.oplist.org/llms.txt`, but all concrete documentation links have already been normalized to `https://fox.oplist.org`.

Use this file instead of reading `llms.txt` directly when you need request or response schema details.

- [Pagination](https://fox.oplist.org/211045428d0.md)
